scripts.test:full: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:zip
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/e2e/itc/smoke --project=e2e-itc | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/smoke-itc.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:catalog: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/catalog --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-catalog.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:inventory: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/distribution tests/evm/inventory --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-inventory.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:orders: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/orders --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-orders.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:dealers: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/dealers --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-dealers.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:reports: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/reports --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-reports.log -Append"
scripts.test:evm:system: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/evm/system tests/evm/staff tests/evm/admin --project=e2e-admin | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/evm-system.log -Append"
scripts.test:dealer:inventory: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/dealer/inventory --project=e2e-dealer | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/dealer-inventory.log -Append"
scripts.test:dealer:sales: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/dealer/sales tests/dealer/crm --project=e2e-dealer | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/dealer-sales.log -Append"
scripts.test:dealer:payments: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/dealer/payments tests/dealer/reports --project=e2e-dealer | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/dealer-payments.log -Append"
scripts.test:dealer:system: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/dealer/system tests/dealer/dashboard --project=e2e-dealer | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/dealer-system.log -Append"
scripts.test:itc: powershell -Command "npx playwright test tests/e2e/itc/smoke --project=e2e-itc | Tee-Object -FilePath playwright-report/smoke-itc.log -Append"
